diyOrdersPage.title: DIY Orders
diyOrdersPage.description: After the customer confirms and pays the product fee, record purchasing cost, link, shipping, service fee, and warehouse arrival here.

form.quoteProvided: Quote has been sent to customer
form.customerFeedbackPlaceholder: Record whether the customer accepted the quote, asked questions, requested changes, or rejected it.
form.purchasingSection: Purchasing after customer confirmation and payment

convert.title: Convert to normal order
convert.description: After the customer accepts the quote and pays the invoice, convert this DIY request into a normal order so operators can continue it from the unified order list.
convert.requirements: Conversion requires a registered user account, a saved delivery address, and either Product cost USD or Quote USD.

trash.descriptionActive: Move invalid, duplicate, or test DIY requests to the trash first. Only trash items can be permanently deleted.
trash.descriptionTrash: Restore the DIY request back to the active queue, or permanently delete it from the system.
trash.restoreConfirm: Restore this DIY order from trash?
trash.restoreNotice: Restore this DIY request back to the active queue.
trash.deleteForeverConfirm: Permanently delete this DIY order from trash? This cannot be undone.
trash.deleteForeverNotice: Permanently delete this DIY request from the trash. This cannot be undone.
trash.moveToTrashConfirm: Move this DIY order to trash?
trash.moveToTrashNotice: This will move the DIY request to the trash first. Empty the trash later if you want to permanently delete it.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Order / user / product / package / tracking / payment

snapshot.feesSubtitle: Goods payment, service fee, freight estimate, actual freight and refunds
snapshot.lifecycleSubtitle: Created, paid, completed and modified timestamps
snapshot.lifecycleNotice: Lifecycle dates are updated by workflow actions and payment callbacks.
snapshot.workflowSubtitle: Substatus fields, assignee and operational ownership
snapshot.customerHint: Open the user profile to edit account-level details.
snapshot.name: Name
snapshot.packageShippingSubtitle: Carrier, fee state, tracking and package measurements
snapshot.packageShippingHint: Edit package tracking, carrier and shipping fee from Package Center.
snapshot.orderActionsBodyActive: Deleting an order first moves it to trash. Permanent deletion is only available from trash.
snapshot.orderActionsBodyTrash: This order is in trash. Restore it or permanently delete it.
snapshot.dynamicActionsDescription: Buttons change with payment, review, purchase, warehouse, package and shipping states.
snapshot.paymentRecordsHint: Open Finance Center to inspect payment payloads and gateway settings.
snapshot.notePlaceholder: Add admin, purchase, warehouse, finance, risk, or support note.
snapshot.timelineLogsHint: Open Order Logs for a full audit view.

detailPage.addressActionsDescription: Most orders do not need address changes. Open the editor only when the customer has confirmed a correction.
detailPage.freightReadinessHint: Update package weight / dimensions / shipping fee in the Package record, then return here to request customer payment.
detailPage.editShippingAddressDescription: Update the shipping address only when a correction is really needed.
detailPage.notePlaceholder: Add admin, purchase, warehouse, finance, risk, or support note.
detailPage.qcCheckpointTitle: Share QC photos and shipping payment together before shipment
detailPage.qcCheckpointDescription: After warehouse inspection, email the QC photos and international shipping payment request to the customer in one step. Only mark shipment after the customer confirms there is no issue and pays the freight.
detailPage.qcSentTitle: QC photos and shipping payment sent to customer
detailPage.qcSentPending: Pending. Use the button above to email the QC photos and freight payment request through SMTP.
detailPage.qcSentBlocked: Pending. Upload QC photos first before sending them to the customer.
detailPage.qcConfirmedPending: Waiting for customer feedback and freight payment. Confirm this only after the customer replies that shipment can proceed.
detailPage.qcConfirmedBlocked: Blocked until the QC photos are sent to the customer first.
detailPage.qcShipmentHold: Shipment should remain on hold until customer QC confirmation is recorded.

workflowPanel.operatorNow: What should the operator do now

logDetails.reviewApprovedReadyForPurchase: Review approved, order ready for purchase
logDetails.qcPhotosSentByEmail: QC photos sent to customer by email

qcUploader.dropImagesHint: Auto uploads after drop or selection · PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF · Max 12MB
qcUploader.uploadSlow: Upload is taking longer than expected. Please wait or try a smaller image.
qcUploader.selectAtLeastOneImage: Select at least one image first.
qcUploader.uploadTimedOut: Upload timed out. Please try a smaller image or check the network.
qcUploader.uploadDidNotFinish: Upload did not finish. Please try again.

modals.editItemDescription: Update SKU, quantity, pricing, and item purchase status for {title}.

freightEditor.empty: Create the package first after warehouse receipt. Once a package exists, you can edit weight, dimensions, and shipping fee here without switching to the Packages page.

statusForm.readonlyNotice: Workflow-derived fields stay read-only here. Use the Dynamic Actions above for lifecycle changes, and manage package-linked states from the package workflow.
statusForm.orderStatusHint: Derived overall state. Change it through workflow actions instead of editing directly.
statusForm.orderSourceHint: Captured when the order is created and should stay immutable for reporting consistency.
statusForm.purchaseStatusHint: Derived from all item purchase statuses. Edit each product line item instead of changing the order-level purchase status here.
statusForm.packageStatusHint: Managed from package records and shipping workflow so order-page edits do not desync package data.
statusForm.shippingPaymentStatusHint: Derived from package and freight workflow. Keep this read-only here to avoid skipping ahead of purchasing or warehouse stages.
statusForm.shippingStatusHint: Driven by parcel dispatch and tracking events. Update it through package/shipping workflow instead.
statusForm.assigneeHint: Assign the owner responsible for the next operational follow-up.

paid_product.label: Paid Product
paid_product.hint: Payment is settled. Review and release the order into purchasing.

purchasing.label: Purchasing
purchasing.hint: Buyer is placing the supplier order or confirming seller details.

partial_purchased.label: Partial Purchased
partial_purchased.hint: Only part of the order has been purchased. Remaining items still need follow-up.

purchased.label: Purchased
purchased.hint: Supplier order is complete and the warehouse is waiting for inbound arrival.

warehouse_received.label: Warehouse Received
warehouse_received.hint: Goods reached the warehouse and can move into package / freight preparation.

freight_pending.label: International Freight Pending
freight_pending.hint: Freight quote is pending customer payment.

freight_paid.label: International Freight Paid
freight_paid.hint: Freight was paid and the parcel is almost ready to dispatch.

customer_confirmed.label: Customer Confirmed
customer_confirmed.hint: The parcel is confirmed for dispatch and waiting for the team to ship.

shipped.label: Shipped
shipped.hint: The parcel already left the warehouse and is moving through logistics.

completed.label: Completed
completed.hint: The normal delivery workflow is finished.

after_sales.label: Order After Sales
after_sales.hint: Only lights up when the order enters cancellation, refund, or exception handling.

refundPending.title: Process the refund request
refundPending.detail: Finance or operations should verify the refund amount and use the refund workflow once the money is returned to the customer.

refundState.title: After-sales is in refund state
refundState.detail: This order has already entered refund handling. Confirm records, notes, and payment logs are complete.

cancelFlow.title: Follow through the cancellation flow
cancelFlow.detail: Confirm whether any payment, supplier purchase, or refund follow-up is still outstanding before closing the case.

reviewBeforePurchase.title: Review the order before purchasing
reviewBeforePurchase.detail: Check compliance, restricted-goods risk, and pricing details, then use Review passed or Risk review.

riskException.title: Resolve the risk exception
riskException.detail: This order is blocked by risk handling. Decide whether to cancel, refund, or manually resolve the restricted-item issue.

collectProductPayment.title: Collect or confirm product payment
collectProductPayment.detail: Send a payment reminder to the customer, or mark the product as paid after finance confirms the incoming payment.

startPurchasing.title: Start the purchasing step
startPurchasing.detail: The order is already paid. The next operator action is usually Start purchase after confirming the order is safe to buy.

continuePurchasing.title: Continue supplier purchasing
continuePurchasing.detail: Follow up with the seller and update the order to Mark purchased when the supplier order is fully placed.

finishRemainingSupplierItems.title: Finish the remaining supplier items
finishRemainingSupplierItems.detail: Part of the order is already purchased. Complete the remaining items, then mark the full order as purchased.

handleException.title: Handle the exception before normal flow continues
handleException.detail: This order needs manual follow-up such as refund, price-difference handling, or customer communication before it can proceed.

waitWarehouseInbound.title: Wait for warehouse inbound and update receipt
waitWarehouseInbound.detail: Track the seller shipment into the warehouse. Use Partial inbound or Mark received when the goods arrive.

completeRemainingInbound.title: Complete the remaining inbound items
completeRemainingInbound.detail: Some items arrived, but not all. Keep checking warehouse intake and mark received once the full order is complete.

createParcel.title: Create the parcel and prepare QC / freight quote
createParcel.detail: The goods are in the warehouse. Create the package first, confirm weights or dimensions, upload QC photos, and prepare the international freight amount before requesting payment.

uploadQcBeforeFreight.title: Upload QC and calculate freight before requesting payment
uploadQcBeforeFreight.detail: The package exists, but freight has not been requested yet. Upload QC photos, confirm the shipping amount, then use Request ship fee to move the order into customer payment.

collectInternationalFreight.title: Collect international freight payment
collectInternationalFreight.detail: The freight quote is waiting for the customer. Follow up on payment, then mark the parcel as freight paid.

sendQcPhotos.title: Send QC photos to the customer
sendQcPhotos.detail: Warehouse inspection is complete. Email the QC photos through SMTP so the customer can approve the goods before shipment.

waitQcApproval.title: Wait for customer QC approval
waitQcApproval.detail: QC photos were already sent. Hold shipment until the customer confirms the inspection photos and record that confirmation here.

dispatchParcel.title: Dispatch the parcel to the carrier
dispatchParcel.detail: Freight is paid and the parcel is ready. Hand it to the carrier and use Mark shipped once dispatch is complete.

monitorLogistics.title: Monitor the logistics movement
monitorLogistics.detail: The parcel has shipped. Update it to In transit when tracking starts moving and keep an eye on delivery progress.

watchDelivery.title: Watch delivery and close the order at the right time
watchDelivery.detail: Keep monitoring tracking updates. When delivery is confirmed, mark the order completed.

noImmediateAction.title: No immediate action required
noImmediateAction.detail: The main fulfillment workflow is finished. Only reopen attention if the customer raises an after-sales request.

reviewCurrentStage.title: Review {stage}
reviewCurrentStage.detail: Check the current status combination and use the dynamic action buttons below to move the order to its next milestone.
